column1: Support Program - New Early Stage Startups - Onboarding Procedures

column3: Document No: SP-01-01-PM Rev 0

column5: Head of the Support Program - Jamal

column3: Request Initiation
Startup Founder Approach Ipark and request support
Start Up Founder to issue request email to the Support Program Email
Expression of Interest Form
1. Startup Info, Solution, Industry, VP, Business Model…...
2. Cofounder's  Passport Copy and Company Trade License for Veting Purposes
Vetting Process
Ops Support vets the applicants
Review EOI Application Form
HoSP review and assess the application Form and decide if the applicants meet Ipark Criteria
Needs Assessment Process
1. Introductory meeting to introduce the team, asses the pitch deck and identify the support needed
3. HoSP presents the Support Program
2. HoSP will act as mentor and provide guidance to the founders
3. Establish a roadmap to enter the support program
Startup Founders issue undertaking to comply with the Roadmap
HoSP will conduct followup meetings and issue recommendation to Ipark Director
Selection Meeting to decide who will enter the SP
Issue Acceptance or Decline Notifcation
Onboarding to the Support Program
